title: pentameris papillosa
intro: Pentameris papillosa is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Pentameris papillosa is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
